title: The Four Step Process to Loop Engineer ANYTHING (+ Why Prompt Engineering Isn't Dead)
summary: Chase AI argues that prompt engineering is not dead despite claims otherwise, and explains loop engineering as a four-step process for building iterative AI workflows. The video positions loop engineering as an evolution of rather than replacement for prompt engineering techniques.
writeup: Chase AI presents loop engineering as a four-step process for building iterative AI workflows and counters the claim that prompt engineering is obsolete. The argument frames loop engineering as an evolution of prompt engineering rather than a replacement for it. The takeaway: prompt engineering techniques carry forward into iterative loops, and the four steps offer a structure for applying them to a range of tasks.
